tasks.description: Add light theme token overrides and system/dark selectors in app.css
steps: src/app.css contains [data-theme="light"] selector with all 10 color token overrides matching MASTER.md light theme values
src/app.css contains [data-theme="system"] selector with @media (prefers-color-scheme: light) nested rule applying same light overrides
Light elevation shadows use lower opacity than dark (rgba 0.1/0.15/0.2/0.25 vs 0.3/0.4/0.5/0.6)
Light scrollbar colors adjusted (track transparent, thumb uses light border color)
pnpm check passes with 0 errors
pnpm build succeeds

tasks.description: Add synchronous theme bootstrap script in app.html to prevent FOUC
steps: src/app.html contains inline <script> in <head> before %sveltekit.head%
Script reads 'mongit-theme' from localStorage
Script defaults to 'system' if no preference stored
Script sets data-theme attribute on <html> element
Script has no async/defer attributes (synchronous execution)
pnpm check passes with 0 errors
pnpm build succeeds

tasks.description: Create theme store with Svelte 5 runes, localStorage persistence, and system preference listener
steps: src/lib/stores/theme.svelte.ts exports theme ($state), resolvedTheme ($derived), and setTheme function
theme accepts 'system' | 'light' | 'dark' values
resolvedTheme resolves 'system' using matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)')
setTheme persists to localStorage under 'mongit-theme' key
setTheme updates data-theme attribute on document.documentElement
Store listens for matchMedia 'change' events when in system mode
pnpm check passes with 0 errors
pnpm build succeeds
